message:
Genericize model table rendering to avoid intermediate allocations

Introduce a ModelTableRow trait so print_model_table can accept
CachedModelRow slices directly instead of collecting into owned tuples.
Split rendering into write_model_table<R, W>() (testable, generic over
both row type and writer) and a thin print_model_table wrapper. Simplify
list_models_from_cached_rows() to pass &[CachedModelRow] directly.
Add tests proving CachedModelRow, owned-tuple, and borrowed-ref
renderings produce identical output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
